createautocrafting.ponder.coil_scene.tex: Logic coils are essential for an autocrafting system
Stack Logic Coils into a multiblock to power autocrafting, with more coils allowing more crafting steps
To complete the setup, link the coil to a network with a stock link
createautocrafting.ponder.coil_2.text_1: Right-click the Stock Ticker to request Oak Planks
createautocrafting.ponder.coil_2.text_2: The Logic Coils schedule the crafting steps and gather the ingredients
createautocrafting.ponder.coil_2.text_3: The Vault packages up a raw Oak Log
createautocrafting.ponder.coil_2.text_4: A Frogport sends it along the Chain Conveyor to the Crafter
createautocrafting.ponder.coil_2.text_5: The Mechanical Crafter turns the Oak Log into Oak Planks
createautocrafting.ponder.coil_2.text_6: The Oak Planks are packaged and stored back in the Vault
tooltip.createautocrafting.crafting_blue: Shift-right-click to set a 3x3 recipe and result.
Insert it into a Crafting Distributor to make it's result craftable.
tooltip.createautocrafting.packager_craf: Right-click a Packager to convert it into a Crafting Distributor.
The kit is consumed when used.
message.createautocrafting.already_patte: This Packager is already a Crafting Distributor.
message.createautocrafting.converted: Successfully converted packager to Crafting Distributor
message.createautocrafting.no_pattern_pr: No Crafting Distributor found nearby. Convert a Packager first.
message.createautocrafting.no_stock_link: Crafting Distributor has no Stock Link on the logistics network.
message.createautocrafting.blueprint_emp: This Crafting Blueprint has no recipe set. Shift-right-click it first.
message.createautocrafting.pattern_inser: Pattern inserted. This Distributor now holds %s pattern(s).
message.createautocrafting.no_pattern_fo: No pattern on this network makes %s.
gui.createautocrafting.plan.title: Crafting Plan
gui.createautocrafting.plan.subtitle: %1$s x %2$s
gui.createautocrafting.plan.no_coils: Not enough logic coils, need %s more
gui.createautocrafting.toast.title: Craft Complete!
